'''changasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldie|oldie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldie|oldie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| changasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chængæshæth|chængæshæth]] || [[word:chængæshæj|chængæshæj]] || [[word:chængæshæsh|chængæshæsh]] || [[word:chængæshæ|chængæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:changangashath|changangashath]] || [[word:changangashaj|changangashaj]] || [[word:changangashash|changangashash]] || [[word:changangasha|changangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:changashath|changashath]] || [[word:changashaj|changashaj]] || [[word:changashash|changashash]] || [[word:changasha|changasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:changafshath|changafshath]] || [[word:changafshaj|changafshaj]] || [[word:changafshash|changafshash]] || [[word:changafshaf|changafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:changashatha|changashatha]] || [[word:changashaja|changashaja]] || [[word:changashasha|changashasha]] || [[word:changashaka|changashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:changashath|changashath]] || [[word:changashaj|changashaj]] || [[word:changashash|changashash]] || [[word:changasha|changasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:changashathal|changashathal]] || [[word:changashajal|changashajal]] || [[word:changashashal|changashashal]] || [[word:changashakal|changashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:changashathatha|changashathatha]] || [[word:changashajaja|changashajaja]] || [[word:changashashasha|changashashasha]] || [[word:changashaka|changashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:changashathan|changashathan]] || [[word:changashajan|changashajan]] || [[word:changashashan|changashashan]] || [[word:changashakan|changashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:changashathaoro|changashathaoro]] || [[word:changashajaoro|changashajaoro]] || [[word:changashashaoro|changashashaoro]] || [[word:changashakaoro|changashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
